asset.title: Two Client Fresh Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates real-time synchronization between two clients when an AI agent reconciles a shared spreadsheet. The step-by-step structure and clear captions make it highly effective.

featureClarity.evidence: The video clearly shows Client A requesting reconciliation and both clients updating simultaneously.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the complete flow from an empty variance column to the agent request and final synced state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean side-by-side layout of both clients with helpful progress steps at the top.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom concept of shared sheets, chat, and agent interaction.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows actual UI updates and agent logs in real-time, proving the collaborative functionality.

legibility.evidence: Spreadsheet cell values and chat text are somewhat small and may be hard to read on smaller screens.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for demonstrating multi-user collaborative financial workflows with AI.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the live update process and agent response times without artificial acceleration.

observedEvidence: Step-by-step progress indicator at the top
Live agent reconciliation filling the variance column on both screens simultaneously

defects.observed: Spreadsheet text and numbers are quite small and hard to read at standard README display sizes.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the zoom level of the client windows or crop closer to the active spreadsheet area.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's NodeAgent reconcile a Q3 spreadsheet live, instantly broadcasting updates to multiple connected clients.
